headline: FITB Stock Dips on Lower 2026 Fee Income Outlook, Raises Synergy Target
summary: Fifth Third shares plunge 3.3% as it trims 2026 non-interest income outlook and updates Comerica integration progress.

raw.headline: FITB Stock Dips on Lower 2026 Fee Income Outlook, Raises Synergy Target
raw.summary: Fifth Third shares plunge 3.3% as it trims 2026 non-interest income outlook and updates Comerica integration progress.

headline: Shares of banks and financial services stocks are trading lower as the ongoing Middle East conflict drives oil prices higher and heightens inflation concerns, weighing on broader market sentiment. A stronger dollar and diminishing expectations for future rate cuts are adding further pressure on the sector.
